svg.title: Child Lock And Access Auth To Door RR Unlock Gate Signal Flow

g.text: Child Lock And Access Auth To Door RR Unlock Gate Signal Flow
(door control + child-lock + access authorization -> DOOR_RR unlock gate)
vehicle parked and dkey/immo auth valid
1. Door control, vehicle, digital-key, and immobilizer context reach DOOR_RR
2. DOOR_RR resolves access authorization and child-lock posture
3. Unlock request is gated by park state and child-lock release
4. DOOR_RR publishes final rear-right door lock state
